title.es: PLE Aplicado: Jensen's Alpha, Cross-Hedging y CAPM Probabilistico
title.en: Applied PLE: Jensen's Alpha, Cross-Hedging and Probabilistic CAPM

summary_es: Este modulo aplica el Probabilistic Linear Ensemble a 4 preguntas financieras que OLS no puede responder directamente. Jensen's alpha se evalua como P(alpha > 0) en vez de un test binario. El hedge ratio optimo se obtiene como distribucion con HDI para cross-hedging con incertidumbre. La neutralidad de mercado se testea como P(|beta| < umbral). El costo de capital (CAPM) se calcula como distribucion, revelando incertidumbre que afecta valuaciones DCF en 15-25%. Se muestra la formulacion completa del modelo PyMC con priors informativos, likelihood Student-t, y analisis del posterior con ArviZ.
summary_en: This module applies the Probabilistic Linear Ensemble to 4 financial questions OLS cannot directly answer. Jensen's alpha is evaluated as P(alpha > 0) instead of a binary test. The optimal hedge ratio is obtained as a distribution with HDI for cross-hedging with uncertainty. Market neutrality is tested as P(|beta| < threshold). Cost of equity (CAPM) is calculated as a distribution, revealing uncertainty affecting DCF valuations by 15-25%. The full PyMC model formulation with informative priors, Student-t likelihood, and posterior analysis with ArviZ is shown.
learning_objectives_es: Calcular P(alpha > 0) para evaluar skill de un gestor con PLE
Obtener hedge ratio con incertidumbre via distribucion posterior de beta
Testear neutralidad de mercado como P(|beta| < umbral)
Calcular CAPM cost of equity como distribucion para DCF probabilistico
Usar ArviZ para diagnosticos y visualizacion del posterior
learning_objectives_en: Calculate P(alpha > 0) to evaluate fund manager skill with PLE
Obtain hedge ratio with uncertainty via beta posterior distribution
Test market neutrality as P(|beta| < threshold)
Calculate CAPM cost of equity as distribution for probabilistic DCF
Use ArviZ for posterior diagnostics and visualization
